styleContinuityAnchors.colorSystem: v2 浅色明亮: 布依靛蓝 #1B3A5C(主文字)/#3A6B8C(品牌)/#6BA3BE(浅靛蓝) + 织锦橙 #D4883A(交互高亮) + 暖白底 #F5F2EF + 银白辅底 #E8E4E1. 全站统一浅色, 替代 v1 深色 #0D1117.
styleContinuityAnchors.liquidGlassSystem: v2 真实玻璃: 面板 rgba(232,228,225,0.25)+blur(20px)+saturate(140%)+1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5)+135deg 折射高光. 导航/播放条 rgba(255,255,255,0.55)+blur(24px)+saturate(160%). hover translateY(-4px)+rgba(27,58,92,0.08) 柔阴影. @supports 降级 rgba(255,255,255,0.78).
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: v2: hover 轻柔上浮 -4px + 浅色柔阴影, 去塑料感.
styleContinuityAnchors.voice: 简洁冷静, 短标题. NO emoji.
styleContinuityAnchors.variableSystem: --apple-* 用于 @theme inline 映射; --c-* 用于元素 style (c-text/c-brand/c-accent/c-glass/c-glass-nav/c-bg-warm/c-overlay/c-white-*/c-shadow-soft/c-divider 等). 4 页 :root 完全一致.
styleContinuityAnchors.backgroundLayers: 环境背景层(暖白渐变+文化图 overlay) → Glass 面板层 → 内容层. 首页 bouyei-nature.jpg, 搜索页纯氛围光, 民歌页 music-ambient.jpg, 文化页 bouyei-craft.jpg. 覆盖层 rgba(245,242,239,0.5).
